meaning: adv.虚弱地,软弱地,有病地adj.虚弱的,软弱的,有病的
examples: She started to sit up, grimaced, and sank back weakly against the pillow.
"I'm all right," Max said weakly, but his breathing came in jagged gasps.
The Dow Jones industrial average rallied weakly after the announcement, recouping a 30-point loss.
He came onto the phone now, clearing his throat, speaking weakly from his hospital bed.
